title: Full-screen setup TUI + grove config verb
description: ratatui full-screen setup flow (cli-side only) collecting provider (Ollama default / llama.cpp), base URL, model, mode (standard/balanced/aggressive), and allowed-tools multi-select (grove, find, grep, ripgrep, extensible). New grove config verb re-opens the TUI pre-populated from existing config; saves via T01 persistence, effective next grove serve. Non-TTY invocation fails fast with a descriptive message. Nice-to-have: model auto-discovery from provider. Note binary-size/compile impact.
